objects.name: ContributionCalendar
objects.description: A calendar of contributions made on GitHub by a user.

fields.name: colors
fields.description: A list of hex color codes used in this calendar. The darker the color, the more contributions it represents.

fields.name: isHalloween
fields.description: Determine if the color set was chosen because it's currently Halloween.

fields.name: months
fields.description: A list of the months of contributions in this calendar.

fields.name: totalContributions
fields.description: The count of total contributions in the calendar.

fields.name: weeks
fields.description: A list of the weeks of contributions in this calendar.

objects.name: ContributionCalendarDay
objects.description: Represents a single day of contributions on GitHub by a user.

fields.name: color
fields.description: The hex color code that represents how many contributions were made on this day compared to others in the calendar.

fields.name: contributionCount
fields.description: How many contributions were made by the user on this day.

fields.name: contributionLevel
fields.description: Indication of contributions, relative to other days. Can be used to indicate which color to represent this day on a calendar.

fields.name: date
fields.description: The day this square represents.

fields.name: weekday
fields.description: A number representing which day of the week this square represents, e.g., 1 is Monday.

objects.name: ContributionCalendarMonth
objects.description: A month of contributions in a user's contribution graph.

fields.name: firstDay
fields.description: The date of the first day of this month.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The name of the month.

fields.name: totalWeeks
fields.description: How many weeks started in this month.

fields.name: year
fields.description: The year the month occurred in.

objects.name: ContributionCalendarWeek
objects.description: A week of contributions in a user's contribution graph.

fields.name: contributionDays
fields.description: The days of contributions in this week.

fields.name: firstDay
fields.description: The date of the earliest square in this week.

objects.name: ContributionsCollection
objects.description: A contributions collection aggregates contributions such as opened issues and commits created by a user.

fields.name: commitContributionsByRepository
fields.description: Commit contributions made by the user, grouped by repository.

arguments.name: maxRepositories
arguments.description: How many repositories should be included.

fields.name: contributionCalendar
fields.description: A calendar of this user's contributions on GitHub.

fields.name: contributionYears
fields.description: The years the user has been making contributions with the most recent year first.

fields.name: doesEndInCurrentMonth
fields.description: Determine if this collection's time span ends in the current month.

fields.name: earliestRestrictedContributionDate
fields.description: The date of the first restricted contribution the user made in this time period. Can only be non-null when the user has enabled private contribution counts.

fields.name: endedAt
fields.description: The ending date and time of this collection.

fields.name: firstIssueContribution
fields.description: The first issue the user opened on GitHub. This will be null if that issue was opened outside the collection's time range and ignoreTimeRange is false. If the issue is not visible but the user has opted to show private contributions, a RestrictedContribution will be returned.

fields.name: firstPullRequestContribution
fields.description: The first pull request the user opened on GitHub. This will be null if that pull request was opened outside the collection's time range and ignoreTimeRange is not true. If the pull request is not visible but the user has opted to show private contributions, a RestrictedContribution will be returned.

fields.name: firstRepositoryContribution
fields.description: The first repository the user created on GitHub. This will be null if that first repository was created outside the collection's time range and ignoreTimeRange is false. If the repository is not visible, then a RestrictedContribution is returned.

fields.name: hasActivityInThePast
fields.description: Does the user have any more activity in the timeline that occurred prior to the collection's time range?.

fields.name: hasAnyContributions
fields.description: Determine if there are any contributions in this collection.

fields.name: hasAnyRestrictedContributions
fields.description: Determine if the user made any contributions in this time frame whose details are not visible because they were made in a private repository. Can only be true if the user enabled private contribution counts.

fields.name: isSingleDay
fields.description: Whether or not the collector's time span is all within the same day.

fields.name: issueContributions
fields.description: A list of issues the user opened.

arguments.name: after
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come after the specified cursor.

arguments.name: before
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come before the specified cursor.

arguments.name: excludeFirst
arguments.description: Should the user's first issue ever be excluded from the result.

arguments.name: excludePopular
arguments.description: Should the user's most commented issue be excluded from the result.

arguments.name: first
arguments.description: Returns the first n elements from the list.

arguments.name: last
arguments.description: Returns the last n elements from the list.

arguments.name: orderBy
arguments.description: Ordering options for contributions returned from the connection.

fields.name: issueContributionsByRepository
fields.description: Issue contributions made by the user, grouped by repository.

arguments.name: excludeFirst
arguments.description: Should the user's first issue ever be excluded from the result.

arguments.name: excludePopular
arguments.description: Should the user's most commented issue be excluded from the result.

arguments.name: maxRepositories
arguments.description: How many repositories should be included.

fields.name: joinedGitHubContribution
fields.description: When the user signed up for GitHub. This will be null if that sign up date falls outside the collection's time range and ignoreTimeRange is false.

fields.name: latestRestrictedContributionDate
fields.description: The date of the most recent restricted contribution the user made in this time period. Can only be non-null when the user has enabled private contribution counts.

fields.name: mostRecentCollectionWithActivity
fields.description: When this collection's time range does not include any activity from the user, use this to get a different collection from an earlier time range that does have activity.

fields.name: mostRecentCollectionWithoutActivity
fields.description: Returns a different contributions collection from an earlier time range than this one that does not have any contributions.

fields.name: popularIssueContribution
fields.description: The issue the user opened on GitHub that received the most comments in the specified time frame.

fields.name: popularPullRequestContribution
fields.description: The pull request the user opened on GitHub that received the most comments in the specified time frame.

fields.name: pullRequestContributions
fields.description: Pull request contributions made by the user.

fields.name: restrictedContributionsCount
fields.description: A count of contributions made by the user that the viewer cannot access. Only non-zero when the user has chosen to share their private contribution counts.

fields.name: startedAt
fields.description: The beginning date and time of this collection.

fields.name: totalCommitContributions
fields.description: How many commits were made by the user in this time span.

fields.name: totalIssueContributions
fields.description: How many issues the user opened.

arguments.name: excludeFirst
arguments.description: Should the user's first issue ever be excluded from this count.

arguments.name: excludePopular
arguments.description: Should the user's most commented issue be excluded from this count.

fields.name: totalPullRequestContributions
fields.description: How many pull requests the user opened.

arguments.name: excludeFirst
arguments.description: Should the user's first pull request ever be excluded from this count.

arguments.name: excludePopular
arguments.description: Should the user's most commented pull request be excluded from this count.

fields.name: totalPullRequestReviewContributions
fields.description: How many pull request reviews the user left.

fields.name: totalRepositoriesWithContributedCommits
fields.description: How many different repositories the user committed to.

fields.name: totalRepositoriesWithContributedIssues
fields.description: How many different repositories the user opened issues in.

arguments.name: excludeFirst
arguments.description: Should the user's first issue ever be excluded from this count.

arguments.name: excludePopular
arguments.description: Should the user's most commented issue be excluded from this count.

fields.name: totalRepositoriesWithContributedPullRequestReviews
fields.description: How many different repositories the user left pull request reviews in.

fields.name: totalRepositoriesWithContributedPullRequests
fields.description: How many different repositories the user opened pull requests in.

arguments.name: excludeFirst
arguments.description: Should the user's first pull request ever be excluded from this count.

arguments.name: excludePopular
arguments.description: Should the user's most commented pull request be excluded from this count.

fields.name: totalRepositoryContributions
fields.description: How many repositories the user created.

arguments.name: excludeFirst
arguments.description: Should the user's first repository ever be excluded from this count.

fields.name: user
fields.description: The user who made the contributions in this collection.

fields.name: isReadOnly
fields.description: Whether this PublicKey is read-only or not. Values will be null for keys not owned by the user.

fields.name: key
fields.description: The public key string.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the key was updated. Keys created before March 5th, 2014 may have inaccurate values. Values will be null for keys not owned by the user.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the object was created.

fields.name: emoji

fields.description: The status emoji as HTML.

fields.description: If set, the status will not be shown after this date.

fields.description: Whether this status indicates the user is not fully available on GitHub.

fields.name: message
fields.description: A brief message describing what the user is doing.

fields.name: organization
fields.description: The organization whose members can see this status. If null, this status is publicly visible.

fields.name: updatedAt

objects.name: ViewerHovercardContext
objects.description: A hovercard context with a message describing how the viewer is related.

fields.name: message
fields.description: A string describing this context.

fields.name: octicon
fields.description: An octicon to accompany this context.

fields.name: viewer
fields.description: Identifies the user who is related to this context.

interfaces.name: Actor
interfaces.description: Represents an object which can take actions on GitHub. Typically a User or Bot.

fields.name: avatarUrl
fields.description: A URL pointing to the actor's public avatar.

arguments.name: size
arguments.description: The size of the resulting square image.

fields.name: login
fields.description: The username of the actor.

fields.name: resourcePath
fields.description: The HTTP path for this actor.

fields.name: url
fields.description: The HTTP URL for this actor.

interfaces.name: Contribution
interfaces.description: Represents a contribution a user made on GitHub, such as opening an issue.

fields.name: isRestricted
fields.description: Whether this contribution is associated with a record you do not have access to. For example, your own 'first issue' contribution may have been made on a repository you can no longer access.

fields.name: occurredAt
fields.description: When this contribution was made.

fields.name: resourcePath
fields.description: The HTTP path for this contribution.

fields.name: url
fields.description: The HTTP URL for this contribution.

fields.name: user
fields.description: The user who made this contribution.

fields.name: message
fields.description: A string describing this context.

fields.name: octicon
fields.description: An octicon to accompany this context.

interfaces.name: MemberStatusable
interfaces.description: Entities that have members who can set status messages.

fields.name: memberStatuses
fields.description: Get the status messages members of this entity have set that are either public or visible only to the organization.

arguments.name: after
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come after the specified cursor.

arguments.name: before
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come before the specified cursor.

arguments.name: first
arguments.description: Returns the first n elements from the list.

arguments.name: last
arguments.description: Returns the last n elements from the list.

arguments.name: orderBy
arguments.description: Ordering options for user statuses returned from the connection.

interfaces.name: ProfileOwner
interfaces.description: Represents any entity on GitHub that has a profile page.

fields.name: anyPinnableItems
fields.description: Determine if this repository owner has any items that can be pinned to their profile.

arguments.name: type
arguments.description: Filter to only a particular kind of pinnable item.

fields.name: email
fields.description: The public profile email.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The Node ID of the ProfileOwner object.

fields.name: itemShowcase
fields.description: Showcases a selection of repositories and gists that the profile owner has either curated or that have been selected automatically based on popularity.

fields.name: location
fields.description: The public profile location.

fields.name: login
fields.description: The username used to login.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The public profile name.

fields.name: pinnableItems
fields.description: A list of repositories and gists this profile owner can pin to their profile.

arguments.name: after
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come after the specified cursor.

arguments.name: before
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come before the specified cursor.

arguments.name: first
arguments.description: Returns the first n elements from the list.

arguments.name: last
arguments.description: Returns the last n elements from the list.

arguments.name: types
arguments.description: Filter the types of pinnable items that are returned.

fields.name: pinnedItems
fields.description: A list of repositories and gists this profile owner has pinned to their profile.

arguments.name: after
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come after the specified cursor.

arguments.name: before
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come before the specified cursor.

arguments.name: first
arguments.description: Returns the first n elements from the list.

arguments.name: last
arguments.description: Returns the last n elements from the list.

arguments.name: types
arguments.description: Filter the types of pinned items that are returned.

fields.name: pinnedItemsRemaining
fields.description: Returns how many more items this profile owner can pin to their profile.

fields.name: viewerCanChangePinnedItems
fields.description: Can the viewer pin repositories and gists to the profile?.

fields.name: websiteUrl
fields.description: The public profile website URL.

enums.name: ContributionLevel
enums.description: Varying levels of contributions from none to many.

values.name: FOURTH_QUARTILE
values.description: Highest 25% of days of contributions. More contributions than the third quartile.

values.name: SECOND_QUARTILE
values.description: Second lowest 25% of days of contributions. More contributions than the first quartile.

values.name: THIRD_QUARTILE
values.description: Second highest 25% of days of contributions. More contributions than second quartile, less than the fourth quartile.

enums.name: PinnableItemType
enums.description: Represents items that can be pinned to a profile page or dashboard.

enums.name: SavedReplyOrderField
enums.description: Properties by which saved reply connections can be ordered.

values.name: UPDATED_AT
values.description: Order saved reply by when they were updated.

enums.name: SocialAccountProvider
enums.description: Software or company that hosts social media accounts.

values.name: GENERIC
values.description: Catch-all for social media providers that do not yet have specific handling.

values.name: HOMETOWN
values.description: Fork of Mastodon with a greater focus on local posting.

values.name: INSTAGRAM
values.description: Social media website with a focus on photo and video sharing.

enums.name: UserBlockDuration
enums.description: The possible durations that a user can be blocked for.

enums.name: UserStatusOrderField
enums.description: Properties by which user status connections can be ordered.

values.name: UPDATED_AT
values.description: Order user statuses by when they were updated.

enums.name: UserViewType
enums.description: Whether a user being viewed contains public or private information.

values.name: PRIVATE
values.description: A user containing information only visible to the authenticated user.

unions.name: Claimable
unions.description: An object which can have its data claimed or claim data from another.

unions.name: CreatedIssueOrRestrictedContribution
unions.description: Represents either a issue the viewer can access or a restricted contribution.

unions.name: CreatedPullRequestOrRestrictedContribution
unions.description: Represents either a pull request the viewer can access or a restricted contribution.

unions.name: CreatedRepositoryOrRestrictedContribution
unions.description: Represents either a repository the viewer can access or a restricted contribution.

unions.name: PinnableItem
unions.description: Types that can be pinned to a profile page.

unions.name: UserListItems
unions.description: Types that can be added to a user list.

inputFields.name: clientMutationId
inputFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

inputFields.name: emoji
inputFields.description: The emoji to represent your status. Can either be a native Unicode emoji or an emoji name with colons, e.g., 😀.

inputFields.name: expiresAt
inputFields.description: If set, the user status will not be shown after this date.

inputFields.name: limitedAvailability
inputFields.description: Whether this status should indicate you are not fully available on GitHub, e.g., you are away.

inputFields.name: message
inputFields.description: A short description of your current status.

inputFields.name: organizationId
inputFields.description: The ID of the organization whose members will be allowed to see the status. If omitted, the status will be publicly visible.

inputFields.name: direction
inputFields.description: The ordering direction.
